message:
Add tab completion for REPL commands (xf-11.3.2)

Implement rustyline Completer trait for xf REPL shell:
- XfCompleter struct with context-aware completion logic
- Command completion for all REPL commands and aliases
- List target completion (tweets, likes, dms, etc.)
- Export format completion (json, csv)
- Help topic completion for primary commands
- Quote detection to avoid completing inside quoted strings
- Deterministic, sorted, deduplicated completion results

Add 17 unit tests covering all completion scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
